summary: Tested useResizeMobile hook implementation across all 5 P0 components on /celebrate-soul. All modals/drawers correctly respond to viewport - top-anchored on mobile (390px), centered on desktop (1920px). No hook-related JS errors found. Viewport resize transitions work correctly with ResizeObserver.

minor.issue: TypeError: Failed to fetch pets (pre-existing network error, unrelated to hook changes)
Some 404s on resource loading (pre-existing, unrelated to hook)

ui_bugs.issue: React key prop warning: Each child in a list should have a unique key prop - pre-existing minor issue

critical_code_review_comments: hook signature correctly changed from [containerRef, isMobile] to just isMobile - confirmed in all 5 components
useResizeMobile uses ResizeObserver on document.body with 150ms debounce - SSR safe, full cleanup on unmount

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all 5 P0 components tested and verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 P0 components (BirthdayBoxBuilder, BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer, MiraChatWidget, ConciergeIntakeModal, WallUploadModal) verified using useResizeMobile() correctly. Hook returns just isMobile (boolean), no containerRef. Breakpoint is 641px. Desktop shows centered modals, mobile shows top-anchored with rounded top corners.

MiraChatWidget.visible_on_mobile: VERIFIED - widget button found on /celebrate-soul at 390px
